description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily clad in reddish-brown brick, with large glass windows on one side providing ample natural light to the interior. The front features a covered porch area with a white awning and built-in seating, complemented by potted plants for a welcoming entrance. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped and others standing alone, and the doors are flush with the brick facade. The interior layout is visible through the windows, revealing open-plan living spaces and minimalistic decor. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor space, and a blend of privacy with openness.
description: A modern, brick-clad, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a covered front porch. The design features clean lines, asymmetrical window placement, and open-plan interiors.
description_view_0: The front view shows the covered porch with a white awning, built-in seating, and the main entrance, along with a large window and potted plant.
description_view_1: This side view highlights smaller, grouped windows and a secondary entrance, with less emphasis on the porch area.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a large, floor-to-ceiling window dominating the facade, offering a clear view into the open-plan interior.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the side and part of the porch, emphasizing the flat roof and the arrangement of windows and doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and single windows
